name: Scales
summary: A background pattern component creating repeating linear gradient stripes at configurable angles and sizes.
detailedDescription: Scales creates a subtle striped background pattern using CSS repeating-linear-gradient. The component renders 1px stripes with 50% transparent gaps, creating a scales-like texture. Orientation controls gradient angle: horizontal (0deg), vertical (90deg), or diagonal (315deg default). Size prop sets the pattern repeat size (default 10px). Colors use CSS custom properties - neutral-950/10 in light mode, white/10 in dark mode, with optional custom color override. The pattern uses backgroundSize for precise control. ScalesContainer wrapper provides relative positioning with z-10 content layer, allowing overlay on any background. This creates subtle texture ideal for section backgrounds, card overlays, or any context where gentle pattern adds visual interest without overwhelming content. The effect is purely decorative with no animation, providing consistent appearance across devices.
purpose: Add subtle striped texture to backgrounds
Create visual depth through pattern overlay
behavior: Uses CSS custom properties for theming
recommendations: Best for premium landing page sections and hero compositions.
Use as a supporting atmospheric layer rather than the primary layout structure.
